description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a long rectangular footprint and a gable roof covered in weathered gray shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a natural, aged appearance. Multiple rectangular windows with white frames are distributed along the longer side, providing ample natural light to the interior. A small extension juts out from one side, featuring additional windows and a single visible door, suggesting an entryway or mudroom. The cabin sits on a simple concrete or stone foundation, slightly elevating it above ground level. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, typical of rural or semi-urban residential structures.
description: A long, rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, multiple windows, and a small side extension with an entry door.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the cabin is visible, showing two windows and the gable roof's peak.
description_view_1: The long side of the cabin is shown, featuring several windows, a side extension, and the main entry door.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end is visible, similar to view 0 but with a slightly different window arrangement.
description_view_3: The rear long side of the cabin is shown, with no visible windows or doors, just the wooden plank exterior.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in weathered shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple rectangular windows of similar size, asymmetrically distributed along the longer facade, with two windows on each narrow end and a cluster of windows in the side extension
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door located on the side extension along the long facade
